macro.title: Housing demand still growing as mortgage rates reach inflection point
macro.what: Despite higher oil prices and mortgage rates and no indication that Iran war is ending, existing home sales posted another positive week.
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: Escalating Iran War, Rising Oil Prices, Fed Uncertainty Push Mortgage Rates to 6-Month High
macro.what: The daily average mortgage rate rose to a six-month high of 6.53% on March 20
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: Mortgage rates are breaking higher — and things can get worse with Iran conflict
macro.what: The Iran war pushed the 10-year yield above a key level Friday and mortgage rates are headed higher as the conflict drags on.

macro.title: Judge denies NWMLS bid to dismiss Compass antitrust suit
macro.what: A Seattle federal judge denied NWMLS’s motion to dismiss Compass’s antitrust suit, keeping discovery on track for a February 2027 trial.

macro.title: 3 in 5 Americans Fear AI Could Replace Jobs, Making it Harder to Afford Homes
macro.what: Just 30% of Americans believe advances in AI will help boost the economy and help more people afford homes, according to a recent Redfin survey

macro.title: Homebuyers Can Afford to Take Their Time Heading Into Spring 2026
macro.what: The typical home that went under contract in February spent 66 days on the market—the slowest February pace in a decade
macro.why: Price trend signals wealth effects and buyer/seller power.
macro.market: Firm prices help builder margins; softness hits comps and sentiment.

macro.title: Mortgage Rates Jump Back Above 6% As Pending Home Sales, New Listings Post Small Improvements

macro.title: Mortgage Rates Could Nudge Slightly Higher As Fed Holds Rates Steady, Flags Inflation Risk
macro.what: The Fed left interest rates unchanged at its March 18 meeting, as expected, amid the backdrop of the Iran war, which is contributing to a shaky economic outlook
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.

housing.title: The housing blind spot: Why the Senate’s housing bill is a start, not a solution
housing.what: The ROAD to Housing Act passed 89 to 10, but omits employer housing benefits like tax free savings and matching support.
housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

housing.title: Built-for-rent multifamily starts jump 18% in Q4 2025
housing.what: Built-for-rent multifamily construction surged at the end of 2025, extending the cycle’s heavy tilt toward rentals and keeping average apartment sizes below pre-Great Recession levels, according to a National Association of Home Builders (NAHB) analysis of Census Bureau data
housing.why: Supply pipeline sets future inventory and construction activity.
housing.market: Stronger pipeline aids suppliers; oversupply later can weigh on pricing.

housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.
